overview: Ryzous is a professional cybersecurity company web application with a hacker-inspired dark UI. It showcases penetration testing services, vulnerability case studies, and an interactive security dashboard — designed to look and feel like a real-world security startup.
features: Dark hacker-inspired UI with neon green, cyan, and purple accents
Home page with animated activity feed and service showcase
Interactive security dashboard with stats, process flow, and charts
Proof/portfolio page with vulnerability case studies and full-report modals
Terminal-style exploit preview in project detail views
Services page covering Web Pentesting, API Security, Network Testing, Code Review
Contact form with backend storage and XSS protection
Glassmorphism card effects and smooth animations throughout
